ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizing_data" (
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code corresponding to the sizing data (e.g., IT, US, FR, UK) */,
  "it_size" TEXT /* Size in Italy */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* Size in the United States */,
  "fr_size" TEXT /* Size in France */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* Size in the United Kingdom */,
  "breast_measurement" INTEGER /* Measurement for breast size */,
  "waist_measurement" INTEGER /* Measurement for waist size */,
  "hip_measurement" INTEGER /* Measurement for hip size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sizing data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sizing data was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the sizing data is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sizing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_data_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each country (e.g., IT, US, FR, UK) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "sizing_standard" TEXT /* Sizing standard used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of measurement */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., breast, waist, hip) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code associated with the size category */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size category (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, marketer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sizing data */,
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sizing data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size variation */,
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated sizing data */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing style (e.g., dress, shirt) */,
  "variation_detail" TEXT /* Details about the variation in size for the style */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size variation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size variation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_variations_sizing_id FOREIGN KEY ("sizing_id") REFERENCES sizing_data ("sizing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing data utilized for the recommendation */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size based on user measurements */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_sizing_id FOREIGN KEY ("sizing_id") REFERENCES sizing_data ("sizing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing data being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_histories_sizing_id FOREIGN KEY ("sizing_id") REFERENCES sizing_data ("sizing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_histories_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the sizing standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_measurements" (
  "sizing_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing measurement entry */,
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing data entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "measurement_value" INTEGER /* Value of the measurement for the sizing data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sizing_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_measurements_sizing_id FOREIGN KEY ("sizing_id") REFERENCES sizing_data ("sizing_id")
)
